channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Biden posthumously pardons Black nationalist Marcus Garvey
item.description: President Joe Biden has posthumously pardoned Black nationalist Marcus Garvey, who influenced Malcolm X and was convicted of mail fraud in the 1920s.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: TikTok goes dark as US ban takes effect
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Millions of TikTok users in the United States are no longer able to watch videos on the social media platform as a federal ban on the immensely popular app takes effect.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The rise
item.description: The possibility of the U.S. outlawing TikTok kept influencers and users in anxious limbo during the four-plus years that lawmakers and judges debated the fate of the video-sharing app. Now, the moment its fans dreaded is here, but uncertainty over TikTok’s future lingers.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judges allow some Capitol riot defendants to return to DC for Trump's inauguration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Thousands of Donald Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol after he lost the 2020 presidential election. Four years later, some of them are allowed to return to the nation's capital so they can celebrate Trump's return to the White House.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH: Stray dog brings sick, freezing puppy to vet's office
item.description: A stray dog was caught on camera carrying her sick puppy to the front door of a veterinarian clinic in Turkey earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KRON4

item.title: Need to get a tattoo removed? What to know about the risks, the cost and more
item.description: When you’re young and carefree, a spur-of-the-moment tattoo feels like the ultimate form of self-expression. Years later, though, you might have a change of heart.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KRON4

item.title: Live updates: Trump inauguration weekend commences as protesters rally in Washington
item.description: Inauguration festivities will begin in full force Saturday as President-elect Trump and his allies — and protesters — arrive in Washington ahead of Monday's inauguration of the 47th president of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kevin O'Leary says he's offering $20B cash for TikTok
item.description: Investor Kevin O’Leary, widely known as a star from “Shark Tank,” said he offered TikTok’s owners $20 billion in cash to buy the platform during a Friday appearance on Fox News’s “America’s Newsroom.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: South Carolina man pleads guilty to the carjacking and killing of a New Mexico police officer
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A South Carolina man pleaded guilty Friday to charges that he gunned down a New Mexico state police officer who had stopped to help him, marking a turning point in a case that had been set for trial later this year.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN MONTOYA BRYAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Wisdom of a California grandmother, 90, goes viral amid Eaton Fire tragedy
item.description: A nearly 90-year-old California woman who lost her home to the Eaton Fire is going viral for pragmatism and positivity in the face of so much adversity.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: College students accused of online 'catch a predator' plot appear in court
item.description: Six Assumption University students were in court to face charges in a connection made between a Holyoke woman and a man on Tinder, which resulted in a TikTok plot to confront a falsely accused sexual predator.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Shook, KRON4

item.title: Ohio Lt. Gov. Jon Husted expected to fill JD Vance's Senate seat
item.description: DeWine is expected to announce Friday that he is selecting Jon Husted to fill the Senate seat vacated by JD Vance.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, NewsNation

item.title: Capital One technical issue delays payments for users: What to know
item.description: Some Capital One users were still waiting to receive deposits and payments on Friday morning after the company experienced a processing disruption.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden commutes the sentences of nearly 2,500 non-violent drug offenders
item.description: Biden said he is proud of his record on clemency and will “continue to review additional commutations and pardons” before he leaves office on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4

item.title: Nintendo says its new Switch 2 console will be released in 2025
item.description: Gaming giant Nintendo revealed its newest console Thursday in a highly anticipated announcement gamers had been waiting for since rumors of its release first spread years ago.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Southern California native paid off mortgage day before Eaton Fire consumed home
item.description: While those displaced by the Eaton and Palisades fires are still reeling from the loss of their homes and, in some cases, loved ones, many of them say they’re being victimized yet again by price-gouging landlords.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KRON4

item.title: As Biden warns of an 'oligarchy,' Trump will be flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: President Joe Biden's pointed warning about the U.S. becoming an “ oligarchy ” of tech billionaires will be illustrated at Donald Trump's inauguration, when the world's three richest men will sit on the dais as Trump is sworn in for a second term.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI and ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden admin announces last round of student debt relief
item.description: This action signals the likely last large amounts of student debt relief borrowers will see for years as President-elect Trump, who takes office on Monday, has signaled broad opposition to the loan forgiveness.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: Official portraits of Donald Trump, JD Vance are released
item.description: Not waiting until after his inauguration, on Thursday President-elect Trump gave the country a look at what he says are the official portraits of himself and Vice President JD Vance.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KRON4

item.title: Drone collides with paraglider, forcing emergency landing
item.description: A paraglider who took off from Torrey Pines State Reserve in California was forced to make an emergency landing when a drone became entwined in his parachute.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida grandmother who left infant in hot car found not guilty of manslaughter
item.description: A Florida grandmother was acquitted of manslaughter in the death of her 7-month-old granddaughter, but was convicted on a lesser charge.
item.dc:creator: Staci DaSilva, Fox 5

item.title: RI state troopers fired after posting video of man's death
item.description: The Rhode Island State Police have fired two troopers who posted a video on social media of 21-year-old Alex Montesino getting hit and killed by a car on I-95 in October.
item.dc:creator: Leah Crowley, WFLA, NBC

item.title: What to know about RedNote, a TikTok alternative
item.description: TikTok patrons are turning to a new platform in light of the nationwide ban set to shut down the app on Sunday. RedNote, a Chinese short-form video platform, is gaining ground as users look for an alternative to the social media company owned by the China's ByteDance.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Inside the monumental effort behind LA’s firefight, from strategy to meals and laundry
item.description: On a recent day fighting the Los Angeles wildfires, a fire crew's radios crackled to life, warning of nearby flames as helicopter blades thudded overhead. Juan Tapia — an experienced firefighter from Morelia, Mexico — tore out scrub brush as tall as himself, just days after arriving in California.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: David Lynch, director of 'Twin Peaks,' 'Blue Velvet' and more, dies at 78, family says
item.description: David Lynch, the filmmaker and director behind such movies as “Eraserhead,” “Blue Velvet” and the TV series “Twin Peaks,” has died, his family announced in a message posted to his official Facebook page.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KRON4

item.title: Police detain man dressed in fire gear in Pacific Palisades after reported looting
item.description: Editor’s Note: This article has been updated to include new information provided by the L.A. County Sheriff’s Office. LOS ANGELES (KTLA) – Two men, one of whom was dressed as a firefighter, were detained by L.A.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC

item.title: From LA wildfires to hurricanes, immigrants help rebuild after disasters. Some may face deportation
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — While firefighters battled blazes in the Los Angeles area this week, Alejandro, a 55-year-old from Mexico, was one of several day laborers leading cleanups near scorched neighborhoods in Pasadena and Altadena.
item.dc:creator: DORANY PINEDA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Louisiana governor relocating homeless people ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: Louisiana authorities are clearing homeless encampments around the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans ahead of next month's Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Meet the Americans who still take COVID-19 precautions seriously
item.description: Susan Scarbro stares down a bowling lane at the distant pins. She hears a sound that breaks her focus. Was that a cough? Will her mask protect her? COVID-19 remains a very present threat for the 55-year-old. Scarbro has multiple immune disorders, making her vulnerable to infection.
item.dc:creator: DEVNA BOSE and CARLA K. JOHNSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok CEO attending Trump inauguration
item.description: TikTok CEO Shou Zi Chew will attend President-elect Donald Trump's inauguration next week, one day after a potential ban of the video-sharing platform could take effect in the U.S., according to a source familiar with the plans.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KRON4

item.title: Sub-freezing temperatures, sunshine forecast for Trump inauguration
item.description: Sub-freezing temperatures and sunshine are forecast for President-elect Donald Trump’s inauguration Monday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KRON4

item.title: Man sought after 'So I raped you' Facebook message being extradited to US
item.description: French Appeal Court prosecutors said an American man accused of sexually assaulting a Pennsylvania college student in 2013 and later sending her a Facebook message that said, “So I raped you," was being extradited Thursday to the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US government sues Southwest Airlines, fines Frontier for chronically delayed flights
item.description: “Airlines have a legal obligation to ensure that their flight schedules provide travelers with realistic departure and arrival times," Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Live Updates: Trump nominees grilled by senators; Turner ouster draws bipartisan ire
item.description: Thursday marked another busy day of hearings for President-elect Trump's Cabinet nominees as his inauguration approaches.
item.dc:creator: The Hill staff, WGN 9

item.title: Biden warns of dangers of 'oligarchy' of ultra-rich, 'tech-industrial complex' running country
item.description: President Joe Biden will deliver his farewell address to the nation on Wednesday, days before President-elect Donald Trump returns to the White House.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Southwest pilot arrested for suspected DUI at Georgia airport
item.description: A Southwest flight was delayed for five hours Wednesday morning due to a pilot being arrested and charged with DUI, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Natasha Young, Fox 5

item.title: Bondi says she won't play politics as attorney general but doesn't rule out probes of Trump foes
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Pam Bondi, Donald Trump's pick for attorney general, sought to reassure Democratic senators Wednesday that her Justice Department would not prosecute anyone for political purposes but also refused to rule out the potential for investigations into adversaries of the Republican presi
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and MARY CLARE JALONICK, Associated Press, ABC 4
